queries.question: Provide a list of all interviews and also provide a list of press releases for "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?".
queries.sql:
SELECT PressReleases.title as title
FROM PressReleases JOIN Articles ON PressReleases.FK_articleID = Articles.articleID
UNION
SELECT Interviews.intervieweeName as title
FROM Interviews JOIN Articles ON Interviews.FK_articleID = Articles.articleID
WHERE Articles.title = "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?pressreleases a :PressReleases .
    ?articles a :Articles .
    ?pressreleases p:hasArticles ?articles .
    ?pressreleases p:title ?title .
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?interviews a :Interviews .
    ?articles a :Articles .
    ?interviews p:hasArticles ?articles .
    ?interviews p:intervieweeName ?intervieweename .
    ?articles p:title ?title_f .
    FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?")
    BIND(?intervieweename AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Which press releases are for "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?" and what interviews are for the same article?
queries.sql:
SELECT PressReleases.title as title
FROM PressReleases JOIN Articles ON PressReleases.FK_articleID = Articles.articleID
WHERE Articles.title = "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?"
UNION
SELECT Interviews.intervieweeName as title
FROM Interviews JOIN Articles ON Interviews.FK_articleID = Articles.articleID
WHERE Articles.title = "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?"

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?pressreleases a :PressReleases .
    ?articles a :Articles .
    ?pressreleases p:hasArticles ?articles .
    ?pressreleases p:title ?title .
    ?articles p:title ?title_f .
    FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?interviews a :Interviews .
    ?articles a :Articles .
    ?interviews p:hasArticles ?articles .
    ?interviews p:intervieweeName ?intervieweename .
    ?articles p:title ?title_f .
    FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?")

  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me press releases and interviews for "Britain Is Cutting Taxes Again. Why Now?".
